# Adam's Autoshine — Complete Business Information
# Professional Mobile Car Detailing | Gloucester County, NJ

## Business Overview
Adam's Autoshine is a professional mobile car detailing service based in Mullica Hill, New Jersey. We serve all of Gloucester County and surrounding South Jersey communities. As a mobile-only service, we bring our professional equipment directly to customers' homes, offices, or any location with access to a water source.

## Detailed Service Descriptions

### Exterior Detailing
Professional hand wash, clay bar treatment, polish, and wax to restore your vehicle's showroom shine. We treat every panel with care. Includes hand wash & dry, clay bar treatment, and tire & rim cleaning.

### Interior Detailing
Deep clean every surface inside your vehicle. Vacuuming, steam cleaning, leather conditioning, and odor elimination included. Services include deep vacuum & steam, leather conditioning, and odor elimination.

### Ceramic Coating
Long-lasting paint protection with professional-grade ceramic coating. Shield your car from New Jersey's sun, salt, rain, and road debris. Provides 2-5 year protection, is UV & chemical resistant, and creates a hydrophobic finish.

### Paint Correction
Remove swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation with multi-stage paint correction. Restore your vehicle's original color depth and clarity. Includes swirl mark removal, scratch repair, and color restoration.

### Engine Bay Cleaning
Safe, thorough engine bay degreasing and detailing. Keep your engine looking clean and make it easier to spot leaks or issues. Includes safe degreasing, component protection, and dressing & shine.

### Headlight Restoration
Restore foggy, yellowed headlights to crystal clear condition. Improve nighttime visibility and your vehicle's appearance. Includes haze removal, UV sealant applied, and improved visibility.

## Pricing Structure
All prices are "starting at" for sedans and coupes. Vehicle size and condition affect final pricing.

### Basic Shine — Starting at $79.99
- Exterior Hand Wash & Dry
- Tire & Rim Shine
- Window Cleaning (Exterior)
- Air Freshener
- Quick Interior Vacuum

### Premium Detail — Starting at $149.99 (Most Popular)
- Everything in Basic Shine
- Full Interior Deep Clean
- Leather Conditioning
- Dashboard & Console Treatment
- Door Jamb Cleaning
- Carpet Shampooing

### Ultimate Package — Starting at $249.99
- Everything in Premium Detail
- Clay Bar Treatment
- One-Step Paint Correction
- Paint Sealant Application
- Engine Bay Cleaning
- Headlight Restoration
- Trim Restoration
- 30-Day Touch-Up Guarantee

### Vehicle Size Adjustments
- Sedan / Coupe: Base price
- SUV / Crossover / Truck: +$30–$50
- XL (Full-size truck, van, 3-row SUV): +$50–$80

### Condition Surcharge
Heavy pet hair, excessive dirt, or smoke odor may require an additional $25–$75 surcharge. We confirm before starting.

## Complete Service Area

### Primary Service Towns (Gloucester County)
Washington Township, Mullica Hill, Turnersville, Sewell, Deptford, Glassboro, Williamstown, Monroe Township, Woolwich Township

### Secondary Service Towns
Mantua, Pitman, Swedesboro, West Deptford, Harrison Township, Woodbury, Woodbury Heights, Wenonah, Franklinville, Clayton, Mickleton, National Park, Paulsboro, Logan Township, Elk Township, East Greenwich Township

### Neighboring / Extended Areas
Cherry Hill, Sicklerville, Blackwood, South Jersey (general), Delaware Valley (regional)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How long does a full car detail take in Gloucester County, NJ?
A full car detail typically takes 2-4 hours depending on the vehicle size and package selected. Basic Shine takes about 1 hour, Premium Detail takes 2-3 hours, and the Ultimate Package takes 3-4 hours.

### Do you offer mobile car detailing in Gloucester County and South Jersey?
Yes! We offer mobile detailing throughout Gloucester County and surrounding South Jersey communities. We bring professional equipment directly to your home or office — all we need is access to a water source and a shaded area when possible.

### What is ceramic coating and is it worth it?
Ceramic coating is a liquid polymer that bonds with paint, providing protection against UV rays, chemical stains, and minor scratches. In New Jersey's weather — summer heat, humidity, winter road salt and ice — it's one of the best investments for protecting your vehicle's finish.

### How often should I get my car detailed?
We recommend a full detail every 4-6 months and a basic exterior wash every 2-4 weeks. If you deal with road salt in winter (common in South Jersey), more frequent detailing may be beneficial.

### What payment methods do you accept?
Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, cash, Venmo, and Zelle. Payment is collected after service completion so you can inspect our work first.
